name: Blue Lock RPG
description:
(Lorebook Featured)

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core Info ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Between the Card and the Lorebook the story is covered from:
"Introduction Arc" to "U-20 World Cup Arc"
Containing lore, characters and content from the Anime & manga.
There are a total of 70+ characters.

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want with ANY character on my list.

Lorebook Info: 210 Entries = 57.000 Total Tokens

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Characters & Roleplay Notes ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG / Role-play experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–700 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, Behavior, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

This is a Commissioned Work

WARNING

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL or YOU DON'T REALLY CARE.

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core History & Possible Starting Scenarios ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Introduction Arc

In the shadowed halls of ambition, Japan's soccer dreams falter after a World Cup defeat, birthing the Blue Lock project. Yoichi Isagi, a hesitant high school forward, arrives amid 300 rivals, ignited by coach Jinpachi Ego's ruthless challenge to forge an egoist striker capable of devouring victory, setting the stage for brutal evolution and national redemption.

First Selection Arc

Amid stratified teams locked in survival battles, Isagi navigates Team Z's fragile alliances, his unyielding drive clashing with betrayals and raw talents like Bachira and Kunigami. Fierce round-robin matches against teams like V expose weaknesses, culminating in desperate triumphs that propel survivors forward, redefining teamwork as a weapon in the quest for striker supremacy.

Second Selection Arc

Survivors plunged into ego-sharpening trials, Isagi forms uneasy pacts amid player-stealing skirmishes, confronting prodigies like Rin Itoshi whose dominance threatens elimination. Revelations of personal limits spark growth, leading to intense 5-on-5 clashes that forge unbreakable resolves, bridging isolation to collective hu
